opponents.name: Lucky Seven
opponents.title: The High Roller
opponents.description: A random 7 appears on the board, locked - you cannot reroll it. Straights may include the 7 (e.g. 3-4-5-6-7).

opponents.name: Five of a Kind Mandate
opponents.title: The Collector
opponents.description: Complete all five rows with any valid pattern, but at least one row must be Five of a Kind.

opponents.name: No 3peats
opponents.title: Variety Enforcer
opponents.description: You can't complete the same pattern three times in one match (max 2 Straights, max 2 Full Houses, max 2 Five-of-a-Kinds).

opponents.name: Reroll Chaos
opponents.title: Butterfly Effect
opponents.description: Every time you reroll, another random unlocked die changes too.
